skills.description: 8 active skills that transform repos to G-Stack quality

items.name: orchestrator
items.purpose: Main entry point. Chains all skills in sequence.

items.name: analyze
items.purpose: Scan repo structure, tech stack, existing docs and skills.

items.name: audit
items.purpose: Score repo 0-100 against G-Stack quality standards.

items.name: find-skills
items.purpose: Identify where skills should exist across the dev lifecycle.

items.name: find-agents
items.purpose: Find multi-agent and cross-skill chaining opportunities.

items.name: create-skills
items.purpose: Generate SKILL.md files for approved skills.

items.name: apply
items.purpose: Apply full G-Stack template (ETHOS, CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE, etc.).

items.name: verify
items.purpose: Verify all components applied correctly, produce final score.

templates.description: 9 templates with {{PLACEHOLDER}} syntax for skill-driven generation

items.name: audit-criteria.md
items.purpose: Detailed audit criteria and scoring rules

self_healing.description: Automatic error pattern recognition and fix suggestions
